# Skill Dev

> Agency for AI implementation, AI agents, chatbots, website development, CRM and SEO. We cut business costs with technology and measure before/after.

## Services
- [AI Implementation](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/vnedrenie-ii/)
  - [AI Audit & Strategy](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/vnedrenie-ii/audit-ii-strategiya/)
  - [Document Workflow Automation](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/vnedrenie-ii/avtomatizatsiya-dokumentooborota/)
  - [AI for 1C](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/vnedrenie-ii/ii-v-1c/)
  - [AI Team Training](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/vnedrenie-ii/obuchenie-ii/)
- [AI Agents](https://geeedy.github.io/site/uslugi/ii-agenty/)
